channel.title: 番剧每日新闻RSS
channel.description: 自动聚合：新番、定档、PV、STAFF、CAST、延期资讯 | Auto-updated anime news aggregator

item.title: Anime News Network Naver Webtoon Launches 'Cuts Make' App for Short-Form Animation Creation
item.description: Cuts Make enables users to produce videos by selecting scenes, characters from webtoons ― Naver Webtoon announced on Wednesday it has launched a new content creation app titled "Cuts Make," which... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Naver Webtoon Launches 'Cuts Make' App for Short-Form Animation Creation

Chihara-san (Are You a Landmine,... | 来源: ANN | 原文: 'Are You a Landmine, Chihara-san?' Anime Unveils More Cast & Staff, January Delay, Music Project
